message:
client: Replace @vite-ignore dynamic import with static module map

Vite cannot serve unbundled source files through Tauri's custom
protocol. The @vite-ignore dynamic import() returned text/html
instead of JS in production. Map extension panels to explicit
static imports so Vite bundles them as proper lazy chunks.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2
